## BigClungus System Architectural Review

### 1. Directory Structure (/mnt/data top-level)

The system is organized as follows:

```
/mnt/data/
├── 1998/                          # Retro site (1998.clung.us)
├── 1998-archived/                 # Archive of previous 1998 content
├── backups/                       # System backups
├── bigclungus-meta/               # Congress system & persona definitions
├── bin/            ...(truncated)
